# backend/middleware/latency.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:13Z

## Purpose
Per-route latency histogram · Iter 33.

Records request duration in a sliding window per route · exposes p50/p95/p99
via /api/v1/metrics-latency + adds counters to Prometheus /metrics.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import time
- from `collections` import deque
- from `typing` import Deque
- from `starlette.middleware.base` import BaseHTTPMiddleware
- from `starlette.requests` import Request

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `LatencyHistogramMiddleware`: (no docstring)
### Functions
- `_route_key(method, path)`: (no docstring)
- `percentile(values, pct)`: Linear-interp percentile · pct in 0..100.
- `snapshot()`: Per-route p50/p95/p99 + sample count for /metrics-latency endpoint.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Bucket by route (FastAPI path param-templated key when available)
